titleStmt.title: SII 9.250: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 250. (A.R. No. 503 of 1915.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALKANTHARAYA TEMPLE AT KARAKANTHAPURA, A HAMLET OF PEDDATUMBALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 11th year of the reign of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva, Vibhava, Chaitra, amāvāsye Sōmavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1148 April 19 Monday, there having been a solar eclipse on the next day. The Mahāpradhāna Kaḍitaverggaḍe Kannaḍasandhivigrahi Hiriya-Daṇḍanāyaka Bammaṇayya's son Rēcharasa, who was ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand is said to have made a gift of the village Tōhi in Kavatāḷa twelve, after dividing it into vṛittis, to learned Brāhmans (who are named). The vṛittis were not saleable nor mortgageable. What is noteworthy here is that some of the Brāhmans are known as Arasas and Nāyakas, though observing vedic rites. They were ready for taking weapons or to act as pious priests. A grant is made for a keeper of the sacred fire (open to the public).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . surāsuraśirōratnamarīcikhacitāṁghrayē . vighnāndha
kārasūryyāya gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁ
gaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvalla
bha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatu pratāpacakravartti jagadēka
malladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salutta kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire . tatpādapadmō
pajīvi svastisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ
sēnādhipati kaḍitaverggaḍe kannaḍasandhivigrahi manaverggaḍe hiri
yadaṇḍanāyakaṁ bammaṇayyaṁgaḷa kumāraṁ śrīmaddaṇḍanā
yakaṁ rēcarasaru sindavāḍi sāyiramaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvavarṣada 11 neya
vibhavasaṁvatsarada caitradamavāsye sōmavāra sūryyagraha
ṇa nimittatuṁbuḷabīḍina svayaṁbhuśrīkaṟekaṇṭhadēvarapu
rada mahājanaṁgaḷu svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānyadhā
raṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīlasaṁpannaraupāsanāgnihōtra
dvijagurudēvatāpūjātatpararmmārttāṁḍōjvaḷakīrtiyutarssa
kaḷaśāstraviśāradaranēkayajñāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtaśarī
rarappa śrīmadaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷge kavatāḷa hanneraḍaṟa baḷi
ya bāḍaṁ tōhiyaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁtara sarvvanamasyavāgi
kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru haḍada mahāja
naṁgaḷu śrīcannakēśavadēvara nāgēśvaradēvaruṁ Avara ma
gaṁ śaṁkarabhaṭṭaru . Avaraḷiyaṁ cavuṇḍarāyabhaṭṭaruṁ . ti
ppaṇṇabhaṭṭaru . siṁdanūra kāḷidāsabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru
Āvara magaṁ kalidēvabhaṭṭaru chaṁdōga mailārabhaṭṭōpā
dhyāyaru . Avara magaṁ nārasiṁhabhaṭṭaru . tuṁbuḷa rēca
ṇabhaṭṭa Atirātriyājiyaru Avara magaṁ lakṣmīdharabhaṭṭa
ru . tippaṇabhaṭṭaru . kāmadēvabhaṭṭa sōmeyājiyaru Ava
ra magaṁ yajñamūrtibhaṭṭaru . kommaṇaghaḷisāsaru . śiva
yōgi lakṣmīdharabhaṭṭaru . vāsudēvadaśagranthigaḷu . chaṁdō
ga śrīkriṣṇabhaṭṭaru karmāṇikabhaṭṭaru kavirāja Appaṇabhaṭṭō
pādhyāyaru . ṟāṟāviya viṣṇubhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru . yājñika
Īśvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru rēvādityabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru Amai
tapaṭṭavarddhana Aiyapaghaḷisāsaru . Avara mayduna veṇne
yabhaṭṭaru sarasvatimahādēvabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru . śrōtriya
nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaru naṁdāpurada māciyaṇaghaḷisāsaru ku
mārasvāmibhaṭṭaru śivaṇabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru nāgadēvaghaḷisāsaru śiṣṭa
kēśavabhaṭṭaru Ammyaṇabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru buccaṇaghaḷisāsaru śaṁ
karaghaḷisāsaru sōdare dōrarasa Avara magaṁ hiṭṭamarasa sōmē
śvarabhaṭṭaru sēnabōva varddhamānanāyaka Avara māvaṁ mahēśvaramalleṟeya
kuṁdaṇabhaṭṭaru heggaḍe mācarasa Avara tammaṁ nāgadēva naṁbibhaṭṭaru mu
siyaṇabhaṭṭaru divākarabhaṭṭaru jyōtiśa doṇeyabhaṭṭaru pūjāri
padmanābhabhaṭṭaru tārkkika Ādityabhaṭṭaru rāghavabhaṭṭaru cikkadē
varige vṛtti Eraḍu Attirāḷvabhaṭṭaru śrīraṁgabhaṭṭaru kaḍalāṁḍabhaṭṭaru
pārtthasārathibhaṭṭōpādhyāyaru Avara magaṁ perumāḷabhaṭṭaru ma
llidēvarasara dharmmavṛtti purāṇavoṁdu Agniṣṭhage Oṁdu . vēdakhaṁ
ḍika voṁdu śāstrakhaṁḍika voṁdu Anaṁtamūrtibhaṭṭōpādhyāya
ruḍiyāṁḍabhaṭṭōpādhyāyasōmeyājiyaru Uyyakoṁḍabha
ṭṭasōmeyājiyaru nityānaṁdabhaṭṭasōmeyājiyaru śrīrāma
bhaṭṭaru bhāvanāraṇabhaṭṭaru kuruḍiyappaṇabhaṭṭa sōmeyājiya
ru cavuṁḍeyadvēdiyaru kappekalla mailārabhaṭṭaru mattaṁ vēdakhaṁḍikavoṁ
du Antu vṛtti Erppattu tōhige praviṣṭavāgi halduṇiya Ūra muṁdaṇa
brahmadēvanakeṟeyuṁ Alliṁ baḍagaṇa haḷḷada kālveyuṁ Aṁteraḍaṟa nī
ruvaḷiyiṁ beḷeva bhūmi Enituṁṭanitumaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi ko
ṭṭaru . kavatāḷa lōkarasa tanna tōhiya manneyavaṁ kāṇikeyāyadā
yasarvvāyaśuddhi varṣaṁprati hanneraḍu gadyāṇama piṁḍādānavā
gi yoḍaṁbaṭṭu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa . Avikrēyamanādhēyama
ttratyaṁ kṣētramaṁdiraṁ . svayaṁvasadbhirbhōktavyaṁ sadā sanmārggavarttibhiḥ . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī © śrīśaṁkarāyanamaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.250 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
